name: Mission Control
description: What's in flight, what's blocked, what finished while you were gone: a live board of the conversation's tasks, subagent fleet with elapsed clocks, background commands, an inbox of completed-while-away work, one-click nudges back into the chat, and an agent-maintained open-work summary pinned to context.

contextExports.label: Open work summary
contextExports.description: A compact bullet list of the work currently in flight in this conversation: active tasks and their states, running subagents, blockers, and what just finished. Keep it current with the set tool as work starts/finishes — it is pinned to your context each turn so you never re-derive it from scroll. The Mission Control pane renders it to the user live.
